title: stackhousia subterranea
intro: Stackhousia subterranea, also known as the native Australian plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Stackhousia subterranea include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
